definition_of_done: Contract callers can adopt the new behavior without breaking existing request shapes.
The impacted surfaces are explicit enough to split into 1-2 day implementation tickets.
The rollout and regression expectations are concrete enough to define eval coverage before coding.
Required eval tiers pass for this ticket: pr_smoke, pre_merge, nightly, post_deploy.
Rollback instructions are documented and tested at the ticket scope.
known_edge_cases: Legacy callers should receive a deterministic contract error for unsupported request shapes.
non_goals: Do not expand beyond the directly affected Anthropic integration surfaces in this first pass.
tickets.rollback_strategy: Disable rollout traffic, revert the deploy, and preserve compatibility fallbacks.
scope: Update request and response contracts with compatibility-safe fallbacks.
Refresh adapter or SDK-facing boundaries touched by the new contract shape.
Document unsupported request shapes and deterministic contract failures.
Implement the acceptance criteria without expanding beyond the current Stage 1 scope.
Prepare the lane-required eval coverage for pr_smoke, pre_merge, nightly, post_deploy.
tickets.summary: Add or update the affected Anthropic integration surface to support 'Support response format tool mode for tool results'. Focus this ticket on contract compatibility.
tickets.title: Implement Support response format tool mode for tool results: contract compatibility

definition_of_done: Runtime integration paths are deterministic, retry-safe, and guarded for rollout.
The impacted surfaces are explicit enough to split into 1-2 day implementation tickets.
The rollout and regression expectations are concrete enough to define eval coverage before coding.
Required eval tiers pass for this ticket: pr_smoke, pre_merge, nightly, post_deploy.

known_edge_cases: Tool/schema mismatches must fail closed instead of running with partial permissions.
non_goals: Do not expand beyond the directly affected Anthropic integration surfaces in this first pass.
tickets.rollback_strategy: Disable rollout traffic, revert the deploy, and preserve compatibility fallbacks.
scope: Wire tool/runtime integration, schema handling, and retry-safe execution behavior.
Adjust model selection or Anthropic routing behavior needed for the new capability.
Keep the feature behind a flag or equivalent rollout control.
Implement the acceptance criteria without expanding beyond the current Stage 1 scope.
Prepare the lane-required eval coverage for pr_smoke, pre_merge, nightly, post_deploy.
